title: Eames Lounge Chair
description: Italian leather, great for reading. Very pricy but I might buy a knockoff version for the dorm next year.

title: Finish Salmiakki Pastilles
description: Almost spit it out the first time. "Worst candy" but the taste grows on you. Almost salty.

title: Black Currant Pastilles
description: Mr. Pinkowski gave me one to try in the dorm, and they're great. Gonna save up.

title: Spikeball Set
description: Planning on pitching in with the dorm to get one. Spring lawning is so sick.

title: Databend Edition 10 Playing Cards
description: gifted by Jonathan. I dabble with cardistry.

title: Vic Firth Classic Nylon Drum Sticks
Confetti Alla Liquirizia
description: Italian Mint Liquorice. Note: do not chew; the liquorice is strong and an acquired taste.
